description: Style NoteA colour happy wardrobe updater is an essential this summer - this polo tee from femella is the right choice. Style this with denim shorts or opt for uptown cool with a denim skirt, tonal pumps and a classic leather bag.Product DetailsOrange polo T-shirt, has a ribbed blue spread collar, half-buttoned placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a vented hemMaterial and CareBlended fabricCold wash, dry inside outDo not wring or bleach Size and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
